member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController
member.summary: Controller that lets you add, modify and delete applications on the device.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController.GetApplications
member.summary: Gets all VTP applications installed.
member.remarks: Returns all VTP applications installed on the device in a JSON string.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController.GetApplication(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a specific VTP application.
member.remarks: Gets a specific VTP application by its identifier. Expects the parameter {id} as string in the query. If the identifier is not known, query for all applications and look for your desired applications displayed parameters.
member.param: Represents the identifier of a VTP application.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController.EnableApplication(System.String)
member.summary: Enables a specific VTP application.
member.remarks: Enables a specific VTP application by its identifier. Expects the parameter {id} as string in the query. If the identifier is not known, query for all applications and look for your desired applications displayed parameters.
member.param: Represents the identifier of a VTP application.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController.DisableApplication(System.String)
member.summary: Disables a specific VTP application.
member.remarks: Disables a specific VTP application by its identifier. Expects the parameter {id} as string in the query. If the identifier is not known, query for all applications and look for your desired applications displayed parameters.
member.param: Represents the identifier of a VTP application.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController.StartExecutable(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Starts a specific VTP application.
member.remarks: Starts a specific VTP application by its identifier. Expects the parameter {id} as string in the query and its alias in the header of the request. If the identifier or alias is not known, query for all applications and look for your desired applications displayed parameters.
member.param: Represents the identifier of a VTP application.
Represents the alias of a VTP application.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController.StopExecutable(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Stops a specific VTP application.
member.remarks: Stops a specific VTP application by its identifier. Expects the parameter {id} as string in the query and its alias in the header of the request. If the identifier or alias is not known, query for all applications and look for your desired applications displayed parameters.
member.param: Represents the identifier of a VTP application.
Represents the alias of a VTP application.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController.AddApplication(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Installs a VTP application.
member.remarks: Installs a VTP application. Expects the VTP application as binary content in the requests body.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ApplicationsController.DeleteApplication(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a specific VTP application.
member.remarks: Deletes a specific VTP application by its identifier. Expects the parameter {id} as string in the query. If the identifier is not known, query for all applications and look for your desired applications displayed parameters.
member.param: Represents the identifier of a VTP application.

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.CertificatesController
member.summary: Controller that lets you get and set network settings of the device

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.CertificatesController.GetCertificates(Vector.VTP.Control.VCertStore)
member.summary: Gets a list of all certificates of a specific store.
member.remarks: Gets a list of all certificates of a specific store. Expects the certificate stores name as parameter {store} as string in the query.
member.param: Represents the name of the certificate store.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.CertificatesController.GetCertificateBase64(Vector.VTP.Control.VCertStore,Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.CertificateModel)
member.summary: Gets a certificate in Base64 format.
member.remarks: Gets a certificate identified by header parameters in Base64 format. Expects the certificate stores name as parameter {store} as string in the query. Expects the values for Hash, Subject, Issuer, NotBefore, NotAfter in the requests header as string parameters.
member.param: Represents the name of the certificate store.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.CertificatesController.RemoveCertificate(Vector.VTP.Control.VCertStore,Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.CertificateModel)
member.summary: Removes a certificate from a certificate store.
member.remarks: Remove the certificate identified by header parameters. Expects the certificate stores name as parameter {store} as string in the query. Expects the values for Hash, Subject, Issuer, NotBefore, NotAfter in the requests header as string parameters.
member.param: Represents the name of the certificate store.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.CertificatesController.AddCertificateFile(System.Threading.CancellationToken,Vector.VTP.Control.VCertStore,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a certificate to a certificate store.
member.remarks: Adds a certificate to a certificate store. Expects the certificate stores name as parameter {store} as string in the query. Expects the certificates name in the requests header as string parameter. Expects the certificate as binary content in the requests body.
member.param: Represents the name of the certificate store.
Represents the name including file extension of the certificate.

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ChannelConfigurationController
member.summary: Controller that lets you get and set the application channels set on the device

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ChannelConfigurationController.GetChannelAssignments
member.summary: Gets the current channel configuration.
member.remarks: Gets the current channel configuration of the device. Returns the file stream that can be written to disk as a *.vtpcc file containing the configuration in JSON format.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ChannelConfigurationController.SetChannelAssignments
member.summary: Imports a channel configuration.
member.remarks: Imports a channel configuration to the device. Expects a valid *.vtpcc file as binary content in the requests body.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ChannelConfigurationController.GetUsbDriverSettings
member.summary: Gets the USB driver synchronization state.
member.remarks: Gets the current state of the USB driver synchronization of the device.
member.response: JSON string formatted USB driver synchronization state.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ChannelConfigurationController.SetUsbDriverSettings(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the state of the USB driver synchronization.
member.remarks: Sets the current state of the USB driver synchronization of the device. Expects the state as Boolean parameter in the query.
member.response: JSON string formatted USB driver synchronization state.

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DateAndTimeController
member.summary: Controller that lets you get and set the date and time settings of the device.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DateAndTimeController.GetDateAndTime
member.summary: Gets the date and time settings.
member.remarks: Gets the date and time settings of the device, formatted as JSON string.
member.response: JSON string formatted date and time settings.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DateAndTimeController.SynchronizeDateAndTime(Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.DateTimeInfoModel)
member.summary: Sets the date and time settings.
member.remarks: Sets the date and time settings of the device to the settings provided in the requests body. Expects the settings in JSON format, analog to the response of the corresponding GET request. Expects at least a valid entry for dateTime and timeZoneInfo.

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController
member.summary: Controller that provides basic information of the devices status

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetDiskInfo
member.summary: Gets hard disk information.
member.remarks: Gets the free and used space of the devices hard disk.
member.response: Hard disk information, formatted as JSON string

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetVersion
member.summary: Gets VTP version information.
member.remarks: Gets the VTP version installed on the device.
member.response: Version information, formatted as JSON string

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetImageInfo
member.summary: Gets VTP image information.
member.remarks: Gets the image information of the image installed on the device.
member.response: Image information, formatted as JSON string

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetOperatingSystemInfo
member.summary: Gets the Operating System.
member.remarks: Gets the Operating System (OS) of the device.
member.response: OS information, formatted as JSON string

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetHostNameInfo
member.summary: Gets the host name.
member.remarks: Gets the host name of the device.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetArticleNumberInfo
member.summary: Gets the article number.
member.remarks: Gets the article number of the device.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetSerialNumberInfo
member.summary: Gets the serial number.
member.remarks: Gets the serial number of the device.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetDeviceDescriptionInfo
member.summary: Gets the device description.
member.remarks: Gets the device description set by the user.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetDateAndTimeInfo
member.summary: Gets the date and time settings.
member.remarks: Gets the date and time settings of the device, formatted as JSON string.
member.response: JSON string formatted date and time settings.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetErtStatusInfo
member.summary: Gets the ERT status.
member.remarks: Gets the status of ERT on the device, formatted as JSON string.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.DeviceInfosController.GetSupportReport
member.summary: Gets a Vector support report.
member.remarks: Gets a Vector support report for the device. Returns the report as stream that can be written to disk as a *.vsupportrep file.
member.response: Stream containing the Vector support report

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ErtController
member.summary: Controller that lets you get and set the ERT status of the device

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ErtController.GetErtStatus
member.summary: Gets the ERT status.
member.remarks: Gets the status of ERT on the device, formatted as JSON string.

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.ErtController.SetErtStatus(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Activate/Deactivate ERT.
member.remarks: Activates or deactivates ERT on the device. Expects the desired state as Boolean in the requests query.

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.NetworkAdaptersController
member.summary: Controller that lets you get and set network settings of the device

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.NetworkAdaptersController.GetNetworkAdapters
member.summary: Gets a list of all network adapters.
member.remarks: Gets a list containing information on all network adapters of the device formatted as JSON string.
member.response: List of all network adapters, formatted as JSON string

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.NetworkAdaptersController.GetNetworkAdapter(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a network adapter.
member.remarks: Gets information of a specific network adapter on the device. Expects the name of the network adapter in the requests query.
member.response: Network adapter information, formatted as JSON string

member.name: M:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Controllers.NetworkAdaptersController.UpdateNetworkAdapter(Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.NetworkAdapterModel)
member.summary: Configure a network adapter.
member.remarks: Configure a specific network adapter on the device. Expects the network adapters parameters in the requests body, formatted as JSON string, analog to the response of a GET query.

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.CertificateModel
member.summary: Provides information about a certificate. Also used as identifier for a certificate.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.CertificateModel.Hash
member.summary: Hash of the certificate, formatted as string.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.CertificateModel.Subject
member.summary: Subject of the certificate, formatted as string.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.CertificateModel.Issuer
member.summary: Issuer of the certificate, formatted as string.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.CertificateModel.NotBefore
member.summary: Validation time of the certificate, string in DateTime format, e.g. "2028-08-01T23:59:59".

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.CertificateModel.NotAfter
member.summary: Validation time of the certificate, string in DateTime format, e.g. "2028-08-01T23:59:59".

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Models.MemoryModel
member.summary: Provides information about the memory usage of a specific partition (free/used).

member.name: T:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.DateAndTimeSuccessMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Date and time successfully synchronized..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.DisabledString
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to disabled.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.EnabledString
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to enabled.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationIsNotActive
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} is not activated..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceAppRunningDetection
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Not able to determine if {0} is running or not..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceFailedExecutableAutoStart
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to auto-start executable {0}..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceFailedExecutableStart
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to start executable {0}..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceFailedExecutableStop
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to stop executable of application {0}!.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceFailedToActivateApp
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to activate application {0}..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceFailedToDeactivateApp
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to deactivate application {0}..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceFailedToInstallApp
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to install application {0}!.

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceFailedToStartApp
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to start application {0}..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceNoAppWithIdFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No app with id {0} found..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorApplicationServiceNoExecWithIdFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} has no alias named {1}..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorCertificateNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No certificate found with the specified properties..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorControlServerCall
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} did not succeed..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorDateTimeZoneNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Time zone '{0}' is not supported..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorNetworkAdapterModelState
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to You need to provide a network adapters name..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorNetworkAdapterNoAdapterForUpdateFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No network adapters found..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorNetworkAdapterNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Network adapter '{0}' was not found..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorNetworkAdapterServiceSetConfig
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to set IP configuration..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErrorNetworkAdapterServiceSetDnsServer
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to set DNS server..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErtAlreadyEnabledDisabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ERT is already {0}..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.ErtEnabledDisabledSuccessMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ERT successfully {0}..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppActivatedSuccessfully
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} successfully activated..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppAlreadyActivated
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} was already activated..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppAlreadyDeactivated
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} was already deactivated..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppAlreadyStarted
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} was already started..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppAlreadyStopped
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} was already stopped..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppDeactivatedSuccessfully
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} successfully deactivated..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppInstallationFailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The installation could not be started..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppInstallationStarted
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The installation has been started..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppInstalledSuccessfully
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} successfully installed..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppStartedSuccessfully
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} successfully started..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppStoppedSuccessfully
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} successfully stopped..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoApplicationServiceAppUninstallSuccessfully
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Application {0} successfully removed..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoCertificateAdded
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The certificate has been added..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoCertificateRemoved
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The certificate with the specified properties has been removed..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.InfoChannelAssignmentsImportSuccessMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Channel configuration successfully imported..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.UpdateNetworkAdapterSuccessMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Network adapter {0} updated successfully..

member.name: P:Vector.VTP.AutomationInterface.ControllerLibrary.Properties.Resource.WarningUninstallWebServerMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The Web API Server cannot be uninstalled..
